programme.desc: A battle begins between SI Bheemla Nayak, a righteous policeman, and Daniel Shekhar, an-ex havildar, when Daniel tricks Bheemla into surrendering to corruption.

programme.title: Yaariyan 2
programme.desc: Three cousins embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: The last clue leads our heroes to a silent snowy graveyard where they dig up more skeletons than they can handle. The mysterious red cloak villain is revealed, and Kelly must face her past to move ahead.

programme.title: Trade Route
programme.desc: Howler and Little Lewis take us on an excursion down the medieval trade routes. The journey is anything but a walk in the park for these two wine merchants! In the Middle Ages, being a salesman takes a lot of guts!

programme.title: San Francisco
programme.desc: San Francisco highlights: Sailing under the Golden Gate, House of Air for slacklining and trampoline fun, Pier 39 to meet wild sea lions, and rooftop honey harvesting at Fairmont San Francisco. A week of diverse adventures with Nicole and local teens!

programme.title: Sound Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph has a parcel to deliver but when the doorbell doesn't work they discover that electrical circuits can be used to make sounds as well as light

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Colossal Squid
programme.desc: Ant and Fontaine hunt for the rarest of ocean creatures, the colossal squid. But what happens when it turns out to be smarter than you?

programme.title: Sea Lamprey
programme.desc: Daddy Owl and Tiny Owl are impressed by the rock-moving abilities of the sea lamprey. And Grandad recalls when he shared a flat with an old lamprey called Gilly.

programme.title: The Star (Julia Roberts) and The Fighter (Wladimir Klitschko)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts relives her journey to becoming an Oscar winning actress and Wladimir Klitschko shares how he became an Olympic gold medallist and record breaking world heavyweight boxing champion.

programme.title: The Phantom Sub
programme.desc: Does a ghost submarine sail out there somewhere in the ocean? Ant believes it does.

programme.title: Trade Route
programme.desc: Howler and Little Lewis take us on an excursion down the medieval trade routes. The journey is anything but a walk in the park for these two wine merchants! In the Middle Ages, being a salesman takes a lot of guts!

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Sound Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph has a parcel to deliver but when the doorbell doesn't work they discover that electrical circuits can be used to make sounds as well as light

programme.title: Silverware
programme.desc: Re-using the silverware to make something so awesome that it has left us in awe!

programme.title: Old Pillow Cover
programme.desc: Yawn! After a good ol nap let's re-use our pillow covers!

programme.title: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Doki can't stand when he doesn't know something. So when Gabi becomes extra secretive about her diary, he's determined to find out why. The Team learns about spy techniques and ways to uncover secrets that others don't want you to know!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hidden Gem
programme.desc: When Addison and Tess find a note in a funny old pair of rummage sale pants, they think they may have found a clue to lead them to a stash of priceless hidden diamonds!

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: A ghost is preventing Smorph from getting to sleep but little does he know that all the ghost really wants is to have a light-up party with all his friends.

programme.title: On the Spoor of the Big Snake - Part 1: The Serpent's Nest
programme.desc: Five young explorers set off to [Ai] Ais/Richtersveld Transfrontier Park in South Africa in search of the legendary Big Snake, a spirit that can transform itself into anything. They set up camp and learn about the region from local people.

programme.title: Busy Bees
programme.desc: Oto is afraid of bees, and Yoko asks them to leave the park. But shortly after that, Yoko and the children realize how important bees are to our ecosystem and try to get them back.

programme.title: A Singing Cat
programme.desc: A shy antelope needs surgery, while a cute orphaned fox cub gets checked over. Johnny and Inel discover a singing cat. And a gull tries to fly free again after being hit by a car.

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: A Singing Cat
programme.desc: A shy antelope needs surgery, while a cute orphaned fox cub gets checked over. Johnny and Inel discover a singing cat. And a gull tries to fly free again after being hit by a car.

programme.title: The Frog in The Fog
programme.desc: A heavy sea fog rolls in while Darwin and Burpee are on the island, so Newts and Kea need to build a lighthouse to help them navigate the waka home.

programme.desc: Oto is afraid of bees, and Yoko asks them to leave the park. But shortly after that, Yoko and the children realize how important bees are to our ecosystem and try to get them back.

E607 - Siegfried And Rick
programme.desc: When a customer walks into the shop with a signature worthy of presidential praise, can Corey make a new deal? Meanwhile, Chum heads to a prop house in L.A. to reflect on some historic Hollywood items.

programme.title: E3 - Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Matty Blake meets with the team to delve deeper into the moment when they witnessed an unidentified aerial phenomenon entering a rocky mesa on the mysterious property known as Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: E7 - Food Fiascos
programme.desc: Snack on a feast of food horrors from the past: from radioactive energy drinks to scandalous snacks made with Olestra, we uncover the incredible things people once ate without a second thought.

programme.title: E10 - Strangest Places
programme.desc: The world is full of strange and mind-bending places, but some take the cake. Explore an island ruled by deadly predators or a mysterious paranormal hotspot that's a magnet for UFOs and strange sightings.

programme.title: E6 - Bloodsports
programme.desc: Since ancient times through the modern day, brutal games thrill both players and spectators. We explore the origins of history's deadliest games - from Roman bloodsports to Russian roulette.

programme.desc: Tintin and his friends go on an exciting treasure hunt.

programme.title: E18 - Safety Last
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

E917 - Pups Save Katie And Some Kitties / Pups Save Helo Humdinger
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger tricks Katie into watching his kitties, an alarm is set off and the Paw Patrol must rescue them. // Mayor Humdinger swipes one of Ryder's early inventions - an aircraft and must be rescued from an out-of-control flight.

programme.title: E844 - Looking For Things
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is baking an apple pie, so Daddy Pig suggests Peppa and George play a game of looking for things. Peppa and George have fun running around the house solving the clues.

programme.title: E846 - Please And Thank You
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa talk to Peppa and George about manners. Madame Gazelle teaches all the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.

programme.title: E840 - Stone Age Granny
programme.desc: Granny and her friends' historical re-enactment society are being cave people today. Peppa and George join in helping to catch Grandpa Pig who is dressed as a woolly mammoth.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for 'later'.

programme.title: E607 - Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar / Pups Save The Yoga Goats
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: E232 - Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.title: E109 - Mole
programme.desc: Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E232 - Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E204 - Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: E501 - Pups Save The Kitty Rescue Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol.

programme.title: E408 - Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E223 - Pups Save A Snowboard Competition / Pups Save A Chicken Of The Sea
programme.desc: Jake and Everest are excited for the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. // When the PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell, they meet a giant Sea Slug!

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E921 - Pups Save A Flamingo Dancer / Pups Save A Mayor And Her Mini
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol searches for Julia, Julius and a flamingo when they go missing from a dance contest. // The Paw Patrol comes to the rescue when Mayor Goodway and her niece Julia get stuck on a runaway art installation.

programme.title: E202 - A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: E851 - Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E101 - Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: E102 - Rainbow's Lost Colors / Boots' Rubber Band Ball
programme.desc: The twins are excited to see their first rainbow, but it's missing its colors! Dora sets off to return its azul, rojo, y amarillo. // Boots' rubber band ball bounces into the Forest Next Door, and he must ask Cynthia the Centipede to get it back.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: E1 - Festive Special
programme.desc: Carrot, Potato, Parsnip and Brussels Sprout perform the festive classic Auld Lang Syne.

programme.title: E5 - Desserts Of Destiny
programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E14 - Juice
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `juice', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's orange juice, apple juice, tomato juice and sip-it-in-the-heat juice.

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E36 - Go Jet Academy: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It's a rainy day and the team are stuck inside, so Foz reads them his favourite book: Around the World in 80 Days by Jules Verne. The Go Jetters are soon imagining they are characters from the story.

programme.title: E5 - Shadowlands
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. Coco keeps taking shortcuts so Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E32 - The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E6 - Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: E7 - The Pen Pal Badge
programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals.

programme.title: E21 - The Salmon Run, Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska's a cool place to watch the salmon run, but Glitch opens a 'fishy taxi service' to help the salmon avoid tricky waterfalls and greedy bears. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: E6 - Tea-Time For The Grown-Ups
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Sami La Fugue
programme.desc: A winter in Franche-Comte. Sami, committed to a psychiatric hospital, receives a visit from his mother and younger sister, who tell him that their mare has died. The news sends everything reeling...

programme.title: E33 - Petit Pois And The Art School
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E47 - Solderer
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: E52 - Dahut And Old Mummy
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo:2025-2026
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.desc: Olivier Paradis welcomes Canadian tourists for a hike through the Moroccan High Atlas. programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheep’s head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to this Eastern European country is not complete without trying to clean up the streets from Romania’s stray dog epidemic. Are Rooftop and Catfish able to save the strays or does the duo learn that they are all bark and no bite?

programme.title: E6 - The Tough Get Going
programme.desc: With a low morale at camp, the teams must work together to safely rappel down a dangerous cliff, and face their coldest night thus far. With Robin and Wilson gone, the teams find a new pace, and realize an even playing field translates to stiffer competition.

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run

programme.title: E12 - Christmas in August

programme.title: E1 - Mom Gone Wild
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. programme.title: E314 - Jeffy T's Prankwell Emporium
programme.desc: Squidward's prankster dad visits and brings all sorts of gags with him (much to Squidward's annoyance).

programme.title: E214 - Patrick's Coupon / Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it! // Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture!

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: E280 - Abandon Twits / Wallhalla
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew builds a boat for their penny-pinching captain. // SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers

programme.title: E471
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E222
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: Succession Within A Family Business
programme.desc: Corentin is 28 years old and a farmer in Belgium. He wants to take over the family farm, which is 100 years old-and to do so, he has to take on a massive amount of debt. In this film, we follow Corentin and his father to the notary-and wonder: Will he really go through with it?

programme.title: Delhi's Black Kites: How Raptors Keep A Megacity Running
programme.desc: Scientists reveal how Delhi's black kites feed on waste and interact with people. Plus: How a 600-year-old network is easing Bidar's water problems.

programme.title: Street Debate: What Is Driving Young Nigerian Professionals To 'Japa'?
programme.desc: Nigeria is losing a significant number of its most talented professionals, who are leaving the country in search of better opportunities abroad. This mass migration of Nigerians is commonly referred to as 'japa.' In this week's show, Edith Kimani asks young Nigerians what is driving them to leave the country.

programme.title: Succession Within A Family Business
programme.desc: Corentin is 28 years old and a farmer in Belgium. He wants to take over the family farm, which is 100 years old-and to do so, he has to take on a massive amount of debt. In this film, we follow Corentin and his father to the notary-and wonder: Will he really go through with it?

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Breaking Chains
programme.desc: Economic insecurity is part of a cycle of disadvantages for women, often caused by discrimination in employment and education. Women often don't control key assets such as the family home, property, or the right to make financial decisions, further limiting their chances to break the poverty cycle. HER meets three women striving to change that.

programme.title: Travel In Ancient Poetry
programme.desc: The documentary Travel in Ancient Poetry takes the audience to visit ancient Chinese borders and historical sites together, talking about the historical stories and cultural character behind ancient poetry, leading the audience to experience and appreciate the passion of homeland and heritage of civilization expressed in traditional poems.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. Through detailed data collection and interpretation of strict logic and reasoning, with the audience close to the truth behind the events, it prys into the mysteries of the magical world.

programme.title: Himu-Bus! - Pickup Bus Variety Show

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: Rokkaku Seiji's Nomitetsu Railroad Trip: Dosan Line & Tosa Kuroshio Railway
programme.desc: Actor Rokkaku Seiji, a lover of both trains and good drinks, sets out on a rail journey around the world. At each stop, he wanders through the towns and explores whatever catches his eye. Sit back and enjoy this fun-filled railroad trip, accompanied by the music he personally selects!

programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world's great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: E4 - Bears on the Move
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are going stir crazy in the sick bay, but they must recover before returning to the rough and tumble of class. And at forest school, a termite-foraging lesson inspires class clown Valentino to make a finger-licking discovery.

programme.title: E3 - Aerial Hunters
programme.desc: Australia’s birds of prey are some of the region's fiercest predators. These highly specialised killers are powerful, resourceful and striking; they use some impressive weapons to survive. This is the story of Australia’s aerial hunters.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E3 - Nobody Likes Visiting the Dentist
programme.desc: Head into surgery with Mara the koala, who needs a life-saving tooth operation, then assess an injured sugar glider with vet Tim. Cheer as rescue officer Elise pulls a flying fox out of a gutter and see nurse Bree’s clutch of python eggs hatch.

programme.title: E2 - Home Away from Home
programme.desc: Swim upriver with the Bay Family, where Anna offers a hand raising her grandpups before heading home to find interlopers on her turf. Watch a flood in the mangroves nearly sweep away a baby, and see the Townies eat clean through their resources.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.title: Love and the Grand Tug-of-war
programme.desc: A story of the sad love between a man who dedicates his youth to the nearly 420-year-old tradition of the Sendai Grand Tug-of-War, and a Korean medical resident who works on Koshiki island, and what happens with them and their families.

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Due to a hypnosis murder case, a former policeman Guo WenBin with hyperthymesia gets involved with a highly intelligent murderer challenging judicial justice. The suspect openly challenges the law and claims to be a vigilante, using bizarre means to eradicate violence. There is panic among the general public, with lives at stake and much doubt floating around. With his extraordinary memory, he works hard to uncover the mystery of this police-versus-criminal game. Hypnotized at the decisive moment, he uses his subconscious to fight against the instigation of his dark side “Suspect Zero”. He uncovers the truth about the murder and the tragedy behind it, curbing the dark side of human nature and upholding judicial justice. While redeeming himself, he also brings the real culprit to justice.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E276 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: E1 - 音你小隊街頭音樂狂歡
programme.desc: 7位風格迥異的音樂人張震嶽、張碧晨、武藝、小鬼-王琳凱、歐陽娜娜、王赫野、陳卓璇將組成「音你小隊」，受邀參與一場馬來西亞音樂節，結伴踏上異國他鄉的文化探索之旅，沉浸式感受當地的風土人情，探尋當地音樂，進行面對面的音樂交流與互動，用音樂搭建起跨越國界的文化橋梁，展現出音樂無國界的魅力。

programme.title: E12 - 黃玲李玖哲迎戰00後唱將
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E5 - 厚德載物
programme.desc: 運用了經常出現在電影中的特效技術來拍攝，讓觀眾從不同的角度觀看，像置身於拍攝現場一樣；除了有課本上的詩詞內容外，還融入國風體育運動、美術繪畫、音樂表演等內容，利用豐富有趣的環節形式激發青少年學習傳統文化的熱情。

E76 - B. Rattleballs/The Red Throne/Betty/Billy's Bucket List/Bad Timing
programme.desc: Finn practices his sword fighting skills at the candy junkyard, where he meets an old gumball robot named Rattleballs. To Finn's shock, he finds out he's NOT the master swordsman he thinks he is. What the what?! Finn begs Rattleballs to train him, but he soon discovers his mentor's deep, dark secret... a secret that will ultimately test Finn's loyalty to Princess Bubblegum.

programme.title: E4 - Caffeinated Concert Tickets/Temp Check/Replaced/Blind Trust/New Year's Kiss
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby work overtime in order to get tickets to a Fist Pump concert. While working, they drink lots of coffee to keep them active.

programme.title: E6 - A. Hey Pizza!/Gorilla/Girl's Night Out/You're Fired/Super Robin
programme.desc: Beast Boy and Cyborg try their best to slow the pizza delivery boy so they can get free pizza.

programme.title: E343 - Recreational Botany/Generational Conflict/Breathless
programme.desc: Grizzy, a big chocolate lover, is growing a young cacao tree under an ultraviolet lamp. During a trampoline session, the Lemmings accidentally break the lamp, provoking a supernatural reaction.

E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E5 - Ally's Farmers' Inn, The Taste Of Sharing
programme.desc: Carinne visits a unique inn in Ally, run for 50 years by ten local farming families.

programme.title: E100
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E50 - In Autun (Best Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the programme in Autun.

programme.title: E10 - Schools/Ai/Reblochon/Table Tennis
programme.desc: In the summary: students searched at the entrance of schools in France; how to regulate the use of AI by students; the reblochon industry seeking to adapt; table tennis played with frying pans.

programme.title: E9 - Marseille With Gerald Passedat
programme.desc: Under the sign of the Grand Bleu, Gerald Passedat reveals all his secrets and shows us around the city of Marseille. From the terrace of his legendary Petit Nice, in the heart of the working-class Panier district, to the Calanques, the chef reveals the secret nooks and forgotten tastes of this city so dear to Pagnol.

programme.title: E4 - Effects Of Climate Change On Animals
programme.desc: When an animal's cycle is disrupted, this can have consequences on other animals that depend on it from near and far. What can we expect in the short and long term, and what are the consequences for the Indigenous peoples?

programme.title: E2 - High Velocity
programme.desc: Amongst the vines of Lavaux, the World Tracassets Championships is a spring carnival where anything goes. programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: In Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire, the Spengler family returns to where it all started - the iconic New York City firehouse - to team up with the original Ghostbusters, who've developed a top-secret research lab to take busting ghosts to the next level. But when the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an army of ghosts that casts a death chill upon the city, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.

programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD.
